typecheck.command: echo "No typecheck configured for this project"

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit post-.gitignore rewrite step to scan and stage newly unignored required files (especially YAML/config paths) before final validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cleanup-file-moves review observed manual discovery/staging of YAML files after ignore rewrite in commit f34decdf387a30a18e7ab7691377971d6304ec51.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify test command intent by marking `test_dev` as legacy or replacing it with a milestone-aware pre/post cleanup command set to avoid workers choosing stale paths.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both cleanup reviews flagged command ambiguity around `test` vs `test_dev` after tests were relocated from dev/ to tests/.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a precedence rule for mission-specific policy over generic worker guidance (e.g., handling of `.factory/` tracking) and provide a verification-only path for validation features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cleanup-gitignore-and-state review documented procedural ambiguity when running a verification-only feature under an execution-oriented skill and conflicting `.factory/` expectations.
